code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    let n = string.len(line)
    mut result = ""
    mut i = 0
    while i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        if (b >= 65 and b <= 90) or (b >= 97 and b <= 122)
          result = "#{result}#{string.from_byte(b + 32 - 64 * ((b / 97) % 2) - ((b / 97) % 2) * (-32))}"
        else
          result = "#{result}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    println(result)
  when None
    ()
  end
end

Wait, let me reconsider the toggle logic. XOR 32: b ^ 32. But Tyra doesn't have XOR. Let me use: if upper (65-90), add 32; if lower (97-122), subtract 32.

import io
import string

fn toggle(_ b: Int) -> Int
  if b >= 65 and b <= 90
    b + 32
  else if b >= 97 and b <= 122
    b - 32
  else
    b
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    let n = string.len(line)
    mut result = ""
    mut i = 0
    while i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        result = "#{result}#{string.from_byte(toggle(b))}"
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    println(result)
  when None
    ()
  end
end
